allOf.title: windowsAppX

identityName.description: The identity name of the uploaded app package. For example: 'Contoso.DemoApp'.

identityPublisherHash.description: The identity publisher hash of the uploaded app package. This is the hash of the publisher from the manifest. For example: 'AB82CD0XYZ'.

identityResourceIdentifier.description: The identity resource identifier of the uploaded app package. For example: 'TestResourceId'.

identityVersion.description: The identity version of the uploaded app package. For example: '1.0.0.0'.

isBundle.description: When TRUE, indicates that the app is a bundle. When FALSE, indicates that the app is not a bundle. By default, property is set to FALSE.

allOf.description: Contains properties and inherited properties for Windows AppX Line Of Business apps.
